prompt: Buatkan copy landing page untuk aplikasi akuntansi UMKM bernama 'Bukuin'. Target: pemilik warung dan toko kecil di seluruh Indonesia. Fitur utama: pencatatan otomatis, laporan keuangan, invoice digital. Harga mulai Rp75.000/bulan. Sudah digunakan 12.000+ UMKM di 300+ kota.

assertions.name: uses-kamu-register
assertions.description: Uses kamu register (not Anda) for SME audience

assertions.name: has-micro-pricing
assertions.description: Includes daily micro-price anchor alongside monthly price

assertions.name: has-soft-cta
assertions.description: Uses soft CTA with Indonesian particles

assertions.name: no-anda-register
assertions.description: Does NOT use Anda register for SME/consumer product

assertions.name: has-gratis-mention
assertions.description: Mentions free trial or free tier
